children.text: the amount and nature of that assistance;
the disposition by the recipient of the proceeds of that assistance;
the total cost of the undertaking for which the assistance is given or used;
the amount and nature of the portion of the cost of the undertaking described in paragraph (3) that is supplied by a source other than the Agency;
the return on investment, as defined by the Under Secretary; and
any other record that will facilitate an effective audit with respect to the assistance.

children.heading: Access by government officials
children.label: b Access by government officials
children.text: The Under Secretary, the Inspector General of the Department of Commerce, and the Comptroller General of the United States, or any duly authorized representative of any such individual, shall have access, for the purpose of audit, investigation, and examination, to any book, document, paper, record, or other material of the Agency or an MBDA Business Center.
